case_title: GRABOVSKIY, BORIS vs. GREEN, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRABOVSKIY, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-02-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-13-1997

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-14-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC ISSUED AS TO WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE,STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT & FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 5/14/97. SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $100, PAYBLE 5/29/97,IMPOSED ON PLFF'S COUNSEL. HEARING SET FOR JUL-02-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-02-1997, DISMISSAL FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS, SCS; FAILURES TO APPEAR AT OSC HEARINGS; FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND ORDERS.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-02-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-02-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC ON PLTF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
